task: Push the soccer ball into the goal
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A soccer ball is on a green field. A goalpost is in the background. The ball is spherical and the goal has a net. STRATEGY - Push the ball towards the goal. The ball must be in contact with the goal's net to be considered in. Failure modes include missing the goal or the ball rolling away. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the ball for contact; Step 2 push towards the goal; Step 3 ensure the ball is in the goal.**
Goal: any_in(soccer_ball, goal)
Scene: soccer_ball, goal, field
Step 1: reach(soccer_ball)
  affordance_region: the body of the soccer ball
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, soccer_ball, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, soccer_ball) < 0.03
Step 2: push(soccer_ball -> goal)
  affordance_region: the net of the goal
  contact: surface_contact(soccer_ball, goal) [completion]
  spatial: inside(soccer_ball, goal) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: surface_contact(soccer_ball, goal) AND inside(soccer_ball, goal)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the soccer ball
